hypertrophy.reasoning: Address posterior chain and arm hypertrophy while sparing upper body pressing musculature and legs already heavily taxed.

siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: Split Jerk, 3 by 2 at 90 percent. Strength: Back Squat, 4 by 3 at 70 percent. Metcon: Workout: 20/18 Cal Row/Ski, 8 Burpee Box Overs, 10 C2B, Pick a weight you can cycle (but try to stick with quick singles). For hypertrophy, focus on back (lats/rhomboids), hamstrings, biceps.
